name: chromium picolinate
summary: chromium picolinate is tracked for Enhances insulin receptor signaling and glucose uptake with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: chromium picolinate is tracked for Enhances insulin receptor signaling and glucose uptake with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Chromium picolinate should not be pushed as a top blood-sugar product.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Chromium picolinate should not be pushed as a top blood-sugar product.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Chromium doses in diabetes trials vary widely, often 200–1000 mcg/day; routine use should be individualized

sources.title: PubMed PMID 15208835. Minimal citation row added from existing workbook PMID; title/year/journal still require PubMed metadata extraction.
